Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1410 assets | 2026-03-09  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's analysis reveals a heavily bearish market environment, with SELL signals dominating at 469 out of 700+ assets (roughly 67%), while bullish signals remain sparse with only 177 STRONG_BUY and 33 BUY ratings combined. Despite this pessimistic backdrop, there's a notable cluster of V-shaped recovery patterns appearing in the top buy recommendations, with 8 out of 10 top picks rated STRONG_BUY at 90% confidence (AAOI, AEM, AG, AEP, AGI, AJINY, ANAB) and the remainder at BUY with 75% confidence. This concentration of V-shaped trajectories with high confidence scores suggests the dashboard has identified a specific set of assets showing potential reversal patterns, though their strength against the broader market's downward pressure remains to be seen. The middle ground (HOLD at 592) represents the largest single category, indicating most assets lack sufficient momentum signals for either direction. The sharp contrast between pervasive selling pressure and these isolated bullish pockets warrants careful observation of whether this V-shaped pattern subset can sustain momentum or if it's an early reversal signal in an otherwise declining market.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
SOFTENING MOMENTUM
